description: Crafted from 92% cotton and 8% spandex fabric, this high coverage brassiere from enamor is designed with an under-wired moulded style. The double layered cups come in soft feminine shades embellished with an embroidered butterfly. The contrast dé colleté elastic and straps adds to the modern look while a shape that offers exemplary comfort makes it perfect for the confident you. Ideal for support through the day.Made of breathable stretch cotton/spandex fabric for enhanced comfortDouble layered cups with an under-wired moulded style with contrast dé colleté elastic and an embroidered butterfly for perfect shaping and styleBeautifully cushioned straps with perfect stretchPrinted label for abrasion-free comfortWash careHand wash below 40 degrees Do not bleach or ironDrip dry in shade Owing to the intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
